description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have three jobs: lint, unit-tests, and integration-tests, all running on ubuntu-latest. The lint job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.x, installs ruff, and runs it on the docker and tests directories. The unit-tests job runs unit tests on multiple Python versions (3.7 to 3.12) with a matrix strategy, installing dependencies and running tests with py.test. The integration-tests job runs integration tests on different variants with a matrix strategy, checking out the code and running make commands.
